data.body: Plan-review PASS (0 blocking, 14 advisory). Triage: ADV1-9 and ADV12 are substantive ADR-coverage findings and will be folded into the ADR content directly (map onto existing prompt_override_drift gate; write-side enforcement strategy block/warn/confirm; the name-vs-inline-schema fork; schema-name enumeration+validation rule; CREATE/UPDATE/RETIRE + concurrency on schema_version; extend the bpmn-js rebar:Config provider vs new panel; non-happy-path states; schema_version policy as an explicit invariant; positive op-contract-in-code rationale grounded in @register_step/STEP_CONTRACTS import-time population; named persona = pipeline developer/prompt author). ADV11 set_file_impact recorded. ADV10/13/14 are ticket-cosmetic (title verb, process-internal AC) on a design spike — noted, not reshaping the already-confirmed scope.
